title: Amtech I9320 380mm (15'') Pry bar
features: DURABLE: This 380mm (15'') pry bar is made from strong, drop forged and heat treated steel for durability
VERSATILE: With a wide blade for easy prying, it can be used as both a nail pry bar and puller
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
WIDE APPLICATION: Useful for a range of repair, assembly, and maintenance jobs
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Yes Box Contains 1x Pry Bar See more
